message:
test(bocpd): add 25 unit tests for BOCPD regime detector

Cover config presets, BocpdRegime traits, BocpdEvidence JSONL/Display,
detector accessors, observe_event edge cases, burst-to-steady recovery,
decision context, decision_log_jsonl, recommended_delay interpolation,
run-length summary, evidence accuracy, reset behavior, and posterior
normalization under alternating traffic stress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
